TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy_cilekay, title = cilekay, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Sakizaya]}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/wiki/cilekay} }

S.FORM: == satangahan : == cilekay cilekay u zuma a kamu : nu Hulam :蟲 nu Amilika :bug u canan ku cilekay(cilekay是什麼?)ː namakayniay a nasulitan nasakamuan atu natinengan ː == malaalitin tu i hekalay atu zumaay a natinengan ː ==
S.PHON: == sataŋaħan : == ʦir~ɾəkaj ʦir~ɾəkaj u zuma a kamu : nu ħur~ɾam :* nu amir~ɾika :bug u ʦanan ku ʦir~ɾəkaj(ʦir~ɾəkaj***?)* namakajniaj a nasur~ɾitan nasakamuan atu natinəŋan * == mar~ɾaar~ɾitin tu i ħəkar~ɾaj atu zumaaj a natinəŋan * ==
S.FORM: == satangahan : == cilekay cilekay u zuma a kamu : nu Hulam :蟲 nu Amilika :bug u canan ku cilekay(cilekay是什麼?)ː namakayniay a nasulitan nasakamuan atu natinengan ː == malaalitin tu i hekalay atu zumaay a natinengan ː ==
S.PHON: == sataŋaħan : == ʦir~ɾəkaj ʦir~ɾəkaj u zuma a kamu : nu ħur~ɾam :* nu amir~ɾika :bug u ʦanan ku ʦir~ɾəkaj(ʦir~ɾəkaj***?)* namakajniaj a nasur~ɾitan nasakamuan atu natinəŋan * == mar~ɾaar~ɾitin tu i ħəkar~ɾaj atu zumaaj a natinəŋan * ==
